title.zh: 情志养颜：心情好才能容颜美
title.en: Emotional Beauty: Good Mood for Beautiful Appearance

description.zh: 掌握情志养颜的方法，调节情绪，保持心情舒畅，让容颜自然美丽
description.en: Master emotional beauty methods, regulate emotions for natural beauty

zh.text: 中医认为"情志"即情绪心理状态与容貌密切相关。七情（喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐、惊）过度会损伤脏腑，影响气血运行，进而影响容貌。保持心情舒畅，是养颜美容的重要方法。
中医认为七情与脏腑对应，情绪过度会损伤相应脏腑：

items: 保持适度喜悦有益健康
易怒者容易出现黄褐斑
思虑过度影响消化吸收
玫瑰花茶：疏肝理气，活血养颜
菊花茶：清肝明目，舒缓情绪
逍遥散：疏肝健脾，调和情志
红枣桂圆茶：养心安神，补血养颜
百合莲子汤：养心安神，润肤养颜
酸枣仁汤：养心安神，改善睡眠
山药茯苓粥：健脾益气，养颜
陈皮茶：理气健脾，舒畅心情
太极：调和气血，舒缓情绪
八段锦：疏通经络，放松身心
散步：舒缓压力，放松心情
瑜伽：拉伸放松，调节情绪
静坐冥想：放松身心，调节情绪
深呼吸：舒缓压力，平静心情
参加社交活动：开阔心情
培养兴趣爱好：转移注意力
适度倾诉：释放负面情绪

zh.title: 疏肝解郁养颜茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮10分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次
6. 疏肝解郁，养颜美容

zh.title: 养心安神养颜茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮20分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次
6. 养心安神，补血养颜

items: 学会放下：不纠结于小事
保持乐观：积极面对生活
适度宣泄：释放负面情绪
培养兴趣：丰富精神生活
规律作息：保持身心平衡

zh.text: 温馨提示：情志养颜需要长期坚持。严重情绪问题建议寻求专业帮助。保持心情舒畅是养颜美容的基础，配合其他美容方法效果更佳。

en.text: TCM believes "emotions" (Qing Zhi) - psychological state - is closely related to appearance. Excessive seven emotions (joy, anger, worry, thought, sadness, fear, shock) damage organs, affect Qi-Blood circulation, and thus affect appearance. Maintaining emotional balance is an important beauty method.
TCM believes seven emotions correspond to organs, excessive emotions damage corresponding organs:

items: Heart Qi deficiency causes pale complexion
Anger causes liver Qi to rise
Lung Qi deficiency causes dry skin
Kidney Qi deficiency causes dull complexion
Fearful people prone to premature aging
Rose tea: Soothes liver, activates blood, nourishes face
Chrysanthemum tea: Clears liver, brightens eyes, relaxes
Xiao Yao San: Soothes liver, strengthens spleen
Red date-longan tea: Nourishes heart, calms spirit
Lily bulb-lotus seed soup: Nourishes heart, moisturizes skin
Sour jujube seed soup: Nourishes heart, improves sleep
Massage Shenmen: Nourishes heart, calms spirit
Yam-poria porridge: Strengthens spleen, nourishes face
Dried tangerine peel tea: Regulates Qi, strengthens spleen
Massage Zusanli: Strengthens spleen, tonifies Qi
Tai Chi: Harmonizes Qi-Blood, relaxes emotions
Ba Duan Jin: Clears meridians, relaxes body-mind
Sitting meditation: Relax body-mind, regulate emotions
Deep breathing: Relieves stress, calms mood
Listen to soothing music: Relaxes nerves

en.title: Liver-Soothing Beauty Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 10 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily
6. Soothes liver, nourishes face

en.title: Heart-Nourishing Spirit-Calming Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 20 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily
6. Nourishes heart, calms spirit, beautifies

items: Learn to let go: Don't dwell on small things

en.text: Note: Emotional beauty requires long-term commitment. Seek professional help for severe emotional issues. Maintaining good mood is the foundation of beauty, combined with other methods for best results.
